---
title: ""
format: html
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: blog
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [title, date]
    max-items: 5
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

::: {.hero-section}

::: {.hero-image}
![](images/profile.jpg){alt="Volkan Işık"}
:::

::: {.hero-content}

# Assoc. Prof. Dr. Volkan Işık

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Labour Economics | Social Policy | Social Entrepreneurship
:::

::: {.hero-affiliation}
Hacettepe University  
Vocational School of Social Sciences
:::

::: {.hero-email}
📧 volkani@hacettepe.edu.tr
:::

::: {.hero-links}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/do%C3%A7-dr-volkan-%C4%B1%C5%9F%C4%B1k-79150bbb/){target="_blank"}
[Twitter](https://x.com/volkannisik){target="_blank"}
[Avesis](https://avesis.hacettepe.edu.tr/volkani){target="_blank"}
[Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/ADT-9246-2022){target="_blank"}
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3690-969X){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.hero-buttons}
[View CV](./cv.html){.main-btn}
[Publications](./publications.html){.secondary-btn}
:::

:::
:::

## 📝 Recent Posts

::: {#recent-posts}
:::
